svg.style: overflow: visible; filter: drop-shadow(rgba(57, 255, 20, 0.5) 0px 0px 6px) drop-shadow(rgba(57, 255, 20, 0.25) 0px 0px 12px); transition: filter 0.3s;

circle.style: opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1); transform-origin: 80px 15px; transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1); transform-origin: 20px 15px; transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1); transform-origin: 65px 57px; transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1); transform-origin: 80px 105px; transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1); transform-origin: 20px 105px; transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s;
opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1); transform-origin: 20px 60px; transition: opacity 0.3s, transform 0.3s;

line.style: stroke-dasharray: 35; stroke-dashoffset: 35; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none;
stroke-dasharray: 35; stroke-dashoffset: 35; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none;
stroke-dasharray: 35; stroke-dashoffset: 35; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none;
stroke-dasharray: 35; stroke-dashoffset: 35; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none;
stroke-dasharray: 35; stroke-dashoffset: 35; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none;
stroke-dasharray: 35; stroke-dashoffset: 35; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.2s; animation: auto ease 0s 1 normal none running none;
